chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 830 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 17-11-2022 Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner. The petitioner through instant petition, inter alia, seeks directions to the respondents No.2&3 to keep entry of agricultural land bearing survey No.1028 (00-06) acres, situated in Deh Mando Dero, Taluka Rohri-Sukkur in Form-VII with the name of petitioner as per Khasra Girdwari. As per joint comments filed by the respondents No.2&3, alleged 06 Ghunta land is entered in the name of one Sadaqatullah son of Abdul Qayoom Khan. The petitioner claims to be purchaser of the said land, however, he has failed to furnish any record of alleged purchasing. It is matter of claiming of title of the subject land by the petitioner against a private person, for that proper and efficacious remedy is available to the petitioner before the competent civil court. Hence, instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
